name: ProFrac Holding Corp.
business: ProFrac Holding Corp. provides hydraulic fracturing, proppant production, completion services, and complementary products to upstream oil and natural gas companies. The company operates in four segments: Stimulation Services, Proppant Production, Manufacturing, and Flotek Industries. As of December 31, 2025, it had 22 active hydraulic fracturing fleets.
sellsTo: Unconventional oil and gas basins in the United States

exposures.sentence: ProFrac Holding Corp. is a technology-focused, vertically integrated, innovation-driven energy services holding company providing hydraulic fracturing, proppant production, other completion services and other complementary products and services including distributed power generation to leading upstream oil and natural gas companies engaged in the exploration and production ("E&P") of North American unconventional oil and natural gas resources throughout the United States.
Flotek serves specialty chemistry needs for both domestic and international energy markets.

catalysts.event: Delivery of remaining product to Flying A Pump Services
catalysts.sentence: We expect to deliver the remaining $0.8 million of product to Flying A in 2026.
